intro: This tag archive covers ten articles published between April 10 and April 28, 2026, with a severity mix of seven high and two medium reports. Key threat actors observed include Lazarus Group, ClickFix, and Sapphire Sleet. The top vulnerabilities identified are CVE-2024-54529 and CVE-2025-31235. Affected sectors span technology, cryptocurrency, artificial intelligence, and finance, with reported impacts across Global, Asia, Europe, and North America.
